title: GitLab security advisory (AV26-467)
description: On May 13, 2026, GitLab published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: GitLab Community Edition (CE)  versions prior to 18.11.3, 18.10.6 and 18.9.7
GitLab Enterprise Edition (EE)  versions prior to 18.11.3, 18.10.6 and 18.9.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
